D:\Cmake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\TestJson.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\15246\AppData\Local\Programs\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\TestJson.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\TestJson.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\15246\AppData\Local\Programs\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\TestJson.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o TestJson.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libTestJson.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\TestJson.dir\linkLibs.rsp
